title: 'Feedback works... sometimes': Garmin bows to user pressure and makes live heart rate tracking free for Cirqa owners
summary: Now Garmin is taking that negative feedback on board: as reported by seasoned tech reporter Ray Maker (via Android Police ), live heart rate data will be available to every Cirqa user "in the coming days", with or without a Garmin Connect+…
